gamePitch: a dark fantasy collectible TCG where four elemental realms fight cosmic corruption (the Void / Aether Bleed)

world.title: The Elemental Quadrant
world.description: At the precipice of the Void, four elemental realms fight a losing battle against oblivion. These shattered worlds of stone, wave, flame, and wind are home to remnants of civilization, powerful decks, and ancient devastation.

kronos.visualIdentity: ancient stone, granite, moss, earth magic, golden amber accents, titanic golems and druids
kronos.flavorNotes: tanks, siege units, stone golems, rootbound druids, mountain fortresses

thalassa.visualIdentity: deep underwater gothic, abyssal bioluminescence, coral ruins, drowned undead, teal and navy
thalassa.flavorNotes: sirens, drowned undead, freeze magic, abyssal predators, coral revenants

infernus.visualIdentity: volcanic forge, ember-lit hellscape, demonic smiths, lava rivers, crimson and charcoal
infernus.flavorNotes: forge demons, lava elementals, armor, burn, chain lords, ash hounds

anemos.visualIdentity: storm-wracked sky, wind spirits, ethereal purple lightning, harpies and cloud sanctuaries
anemos.flavorNotes: flying units, storm magic, harpies, whispering spirits, hurricane weavers

designRules: Mana 1–8 (most cards 3–6). attack + health should roughly scale with mana.
Roles vary: tanks, assassins, support, siege, ranged, undead, flying, etc.
Ability text must spell out keyword effects like the examples (do not assume the player knows keywords).
ability.name should be evocative and unique within the batch.
Use 0–2 keywords per card from the project glossary only.

image.promptGuidelines: single focal creature or character, dark cinematic fantasy trading card art, highly detailed, dramatic lighting, NO text, NO card frame, NO watermark, portrait 3:4 composition
image.promptSuffix: Dark cinematic fantasy trading card art, highly detailed concept art, single focal subject, dramatic lighting, no text, no border, no watermark, portrait 3:4 aspect ratio.
image.notesGuidelines: negative prompts, palette, camera angle, and platform hints for the image generator
